subject: Write adaptive interview engine
description:
Write the core adaptive interview engine section of the skill. This is the most complex component — it conducts a multi-round conversation to gather all information needed for skill generation.

The interview engine must:

1. **Question selection** — Define question categories covering:
   - Target audience for the skill
   - Main use cases and workflows
   - Specific requirements and constraints
   - Key features and capabilities
   - Platform-specific considerations (initially OpenCode-focused)

2. **Depth adaptation** — Adjust based on:
   - Experience level (Beginner → more guidance/choices, Advanced → streamlined)
   - Skill complexity (simple prompt-based → fewer questions, multi-step workflow → thorough interview)
   - Response quality (terse → follow-up, detailed → skip redundant questions)

3. **Conversational flow** — Instructions for:
   - Building on previous answers (reference what user already said)
   - Skipping irrelevant questions based on prior context
   - Mix of structured choices and open-ended text inputs
   - Early exit support if user signals completion
   - Allow revisions to previous answers without restarting

4. **Response handling** — Instructions for:
   - Terse responses: ask targeted follow-ups
   - Contradictory answers: flag inconsistency, ask for clarification
   - Highly technical beginner: optionally adjust depth upward

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Multi-round interview with adaptive question selection
- [ ] Covers all required topics (audience, use cases, requirements, features, platform specifics)
- [ ] Adapts depth based on experience level and skill complexity
- [ ] Builds on previous answers intelligently
- [ ] Supports early exit
- [ ] Mix of structured choices and open-ended questions

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Terse responses trigger targeted follow-ups
- [ ] Contradictory answers flagged with clarification request
- [ ] Revision of previous answers supported without restart
- [ ] Beginner with technical responses can have depth adjusted

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Incomplete information gaps identified before proceeding to outline

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Walk through interview as beginner with simple skill idea
• Manual: Walk through as advanced user with complex multi-step skill
• Manual: Test early exit, revision, and contradiction handling

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Section 5.3
